title_zh: 利用NVIDIA CUDA 13.3中的无进位乘法构建更快的密码学算法
title_en: Building Faster Cryptography with Carryless Multiplication in NVIDIA CUDA 13.3
summary_zh: 过去十五年来，x86 CPU一直配备有专用的无进位乘法硬件指令。这种小而关键的指令在密码学计算中扮演重要角色。NVIDIA CUDA 13.3引入了支持无进位乘法的新功能，显著提升了相关密码学运算的速度。
summary_en: For over fifteen years, x86 CPUs have featured dedicated hardware instructions for carryless multiplication—a small yet essential primitive in cryptography. NVIDIA CUDA 13.3 introduces support for carryless multiplication, enabling faster cryptographic computations on NVIDIA GPUs.
why_it_matters_zh: 无进位乘法是许多密码学算法的核心操作。借助CUDA 13.3的新支持，开发者可以利用GPU加速此类算法，从而提升密码学应用的整体性能和效率。
why_it_matters_en: Carryless multiplication is a fundamental operation in many cryptographic algorithms. With CUDA 13.3's new support, developers can harness GPU acceleration for these operations, improving the overall performance and efficiency of cryptographic workloads.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Building Faster Cryptography with Carryless Multiplication in NVIDIA CUDA 13.3. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 60.

title_zh: C-Norm：细胞分布归一化实现医学细胞图像的精准识别
title_en: C-Norm: Cell-Distribution Normalization Enables Precision Recognition of Medical-Cell Image
summary_zh: 薄层细胞学检测（TCT）有助于宫颈癌早筛，但人工阅读耗时且细胞病理学家诊断结果不一致。现有AI检测模型在真实临床条件下表现欠佳，主要受TCT载玻片中细胞空间分布不均和高质量标注数据有限两大制约。为此，文中提出细胞分布归一化（C-Norm）方法，通过将异常和正常细胞从原始TCT图像中分离并重组，保证细胞群体均匀分布，减轻分布偏差带来的泛化退化。基于此，结合YOLOv12与DINOv3模块，利用YOLO的先进检测能力和DINOv3的优异特征表示，捕捉TCT图像中的细微形态差异，实现精准识别。大量实验证明该方法显著优于主流检测算法，达成先进性能。完整实现开源。
summary_en: ThinPrep Cytologic Test (TCT) assists early cervical cancer screening, but manual reading is time-consuming with inconsistent diagnostics among cytopathologists. Existing AI detection models underperform clinically due to unbalanced cell spatial distribution in TCT slides and limited high-quality annotated data. This work proposes Cell-Distribution Normalization (C-Norm), which separates abnormal and normal cells in TCT images and re-synthesizes them for uniform cell distribution, reducing generalization degradation from distribution bias. It integrates YOLOv12 and DINOv3 to leverage YOLO's detection and DINOv3's feature representation, capturing subtle morphological nuances for precise recognition. Extensive experiments verify state-of-the-art results, outperforming mainstream detectors. The full implementation is openly available.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究针对TCT临床应用中AI模型受细胞空间分布不均和标注数据稀缺影响表现不佳的问题，提出创新性C-Norm方法改善数据分布，提高模型泛化能力。同时融合先进检测与特征表示技术，实现对细微细胞形态差异的精准识别，具有重要的应用价值和推广意义。
why_it_matters_en: This study tackles key challenges in AI-based TCT clinical applications—imbalanced cell spatial distribution and scarce annotated data—by innovatively normalizing cell distribution to enhance model generalization. The integration of advanced detection and representation techniques enables precise recognition of subtle cellular morphologies, offering significant practical impact and potential for wider adoption.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: C-Norm: Cell-Distribution Normalization Enables Precision Recognition of Medical-Cell Image. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 65.

title_zh: 基于掩码自编码器的无监督钢铁表面缺陷识别方法
title_en: A Masked Autoencoder Approach to Unsupervised Steel Surface Defect Recognition
summary_zh: 钢铁表面缺陷的自动化视觉检测是一项重要的质量控制任务，缺陷标注数据稀缺且获取成本高，而无标注表面图像丰富，促使采用自监督方法在无类别标签情况下学习有用表示。本文使用基于Transformer的掩码自编码器( MAE)，在预训练阶段对输入图像75%的块随机掩码，由轻量解码器从剩余25%可见块重建掩盖区域。编码器联合辅助缺陷定位目标训练，辅助定位仅作为训练信号。解码器达到结构相似度0.92和均方误差0.47。预训练编码器提取特征后，结合UMAP降维和聚合聚类，实现与六类已知缺陷的匈牙利匹配精度91.3%。
summary_en: Automated visual inspection of steel surface defects is critical for quality control, but labeled defect data is scarce and expensive, while unlabeled images abound. This motivates the use of self-supervised learning without class labels. A Transformer-based Masked Autoencoder (MAE) is applied, masking 75% of input image patches during pretraining to reconstruct masked regions from the visible 25% using a lightweight decoder. The encoder is trained alongside an auxiliary defect localization task used solely for training. The decoder achieves a structural similarity of 0.92 and mean squared error of 0.47. Extracted features from the pretrained encoder are then clustered via UMAP and agglomerative clustering, achieving a Hungarian matching accuracy of 91.3% against six known defect categories.
why_it_matters_zh: 此研究在钢铁表面缺陷检测领域展示了无监督学习的有效应用，充分利用丰富的无标签图像数据，降低了对标注数据的依赖，提升了缺陷识别的准确性与效率，对工业自动化检测具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: This work demonstrates effective unsupervised learning for steel surface defect detection, leveraging abundant unlabeled images to reduce reliance on costly annotations, improving defect recognition accuracy and efficiency, which is significant for industrial automated inspection.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A Masked Autoencoder Approach to Unsupervised Steel Surface Defect Recognition. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: OriginBlame：用于AI训练数据集的记录级和标记级数据溯源
title_en: OriginBlame: Record- and Token-Level Data Provenance for AI Training Datasets
summary_zh: 本文介绍了OriginBlame（ob），一种实现作者身份传播并支持精确数据撤销请求的记录级和标记级数据溯源系统。该系统解决了现有溯源工具仅支持文件或数据集级别导致过度删除的问题，使用确定性查询精准定位需要“遗忘”的训练记录。对219,555个维基百科页面的评估显示，记录级溯源将数据集级过度删除从101倍降至1.3倍，同时在不同平台上带来的吞吐量开销较低。基于1.7B参数模型，溯源生成的“遗忘集”相比随机基准提高了42%的去学习效果。
summary_en: OriginBlame (ob) is a record- and token-level data provenance system that propagates author identity throughout data processing pipelines to support precise revocation requests for AI training data. It addresses the practical gap where existing provenance tools operate only at file or dataset levels, causing excessive data deletion during unlearning. Evaluations on 219,555 Wikipedia pages demonstrate that record-level provenance reduces over-deletion from 101x to 1.3x. The system adds a modest throughput overhead (1.3-4.0% on HuggingFace, 2.1-19.0% on Datatrove) and improves unlearning performance by 42% compared to random baselines on a 1.7B parameter model.
why_it_matters_zh: OriginBlame的提出填补了AI模型训练中数据撤销的实际空白，保证了数据贡献者权益，避免了不必要的数据浪费。该系统提升了去学习效果，有利于合规和数据治理。
why_it_matters_en: OriginBlame addresses a critical practical challenge in AI training — precise data removal on user requests. By improving unlearning accuracy and reducing over-deletion, it enables better data governance and respects contributor rights, important for compliance and trustworthy AI.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: OriginBlame: Record- and Token-Level Data Provenance for AI Training Datasets. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 71.

title_zh: SPINE：用智能代理AI弥合网络与物理的鸿沟
title_en: SPINE: Bridging the Cyber-Physical Gap with Agentic AI
summary_zh: SPINE 是一个智能代理框架，旨在帮助非专业机器人用户系统性地调试和部署双臂机器人，减少对专家的依赖。通过构建机器人专属环境和循环诊断修复，SPINE显著提升了机器人从遥控到实际操作的效率和成功率，实现了多平台跨环境调试，推动具身AI的可扩展现实部署。
summary_en: SPINE is an agentic framework designed to systematically debug and deploy bimanual robots with minimal robotics expertise. By creating robot-specific profiles and iteratively diagnosing and repairing issues until teleoperation is achieved, SPINE improves operational success and reduces deployment time across different robotic platforms, moving embodied AI closer to scalable real-world applications.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作直接解决了机器人具身智能中部署智能模型至物理平台的关键瓶颈，简化了复杂的调试流程，使机器人技术更易普及，具备重要的应用潜力。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the key bottleneck of deploying intelligent models onto physical robot platforms by simplifying complex debugging workflows, making robotics technology more accessible and with significant practical potential.

title_zh: CANDI：针对细分领域问答的上下文对齐方法
title_en: CANDI: Contextual Alignment for Niche Domains Question Answering
summary_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）在医疗诊断和财务咨询等专业领域的应用，评估其超越通识知识的能力变得尤为重要。传统的问答基准难以体现细致的上下文基础、用户意识及领域理解。为此，本文提出了CANDI-QA数据集，用于评估LLMs在专业环境中提供准确、上下文敏感且符合用户需求答案的能力。CANDI-QA由专家设计的问答对组成，分为信息辅助问题（直接提取事实）和应用推理问题（多跳推理以生成可操作见解）两类。作者测试了十多种语言模型，并提出了轻量级神经符号框架MTSS-Net作为基线，结合神经检索与规则推理。结果显示当前LLMs在细分领域语境对齐上面临重大挑战，强调了上下文和符号整合的重要性。CANDI-QA为上下文感知语言模型研究提供关键基准，推动高风险领域可信AI的发展。
summary_en: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) in specialized domains like medical diagnostics and financial advisory requires evaluation beyond general knowledge. Traditional QA benchmarks fail to capture nuanced contextual grounding, user awareness, and domain understanding. To address this, CANDI-QA is introduced as a novel dataset evaluating LLMs on delivering accurate, context-sensitive, and user-aligned answers in specialized settings. It features expert-curated questions in two categories: Information Assistance (direct factual queries) and Applied Inference (multi-hop reasoning for actionable insights). Over ten diverse language models are evaluated alongside MTSS-Net, a lightweight neuro-symbolic framework combining neural retrieval and rule-based reasoning. Findings highlight significant challenges in achieving contextual alignment in niche domains, underscoring the limitations of current LLMs without enhanced contextual or symbolic integration. CANDI-QA serves as a critical benchmark for advancing context-aware language models and fostering trustworthy AI for high-stakes domains.
why_it_matters_zh: CANDI-QA针对专业领域语言模型的实际需求，提供了更贴近真实应用场景的评测标准，弥补了传统问答基准在细节理解和上下文适应上的不足。通过引入信息辅助和应用推理问题，推动了模型在复杂推理和场景感知方面的能力提升，同时强调了结合神经方法和符号推理的重要性，为高风险专业领域AI的可靠性和实用性奠定基础。
why_it_matters_en: CANDI-QA addresses the practical needs of language models in specialized domains by offering evaluation standards closer to real-world applications, filling gaps left by traditional QA benchmarks in detail comprehension and contextual adaptation. By introducing both information assistance and applied inference questions, it promotes improvements in complex reasoning and situational awareness, while emphasizing the importance of integrating neural and symbolic approaches. This lays a foundation for reliable and practical AI in high-stakes professional fields.

title_zh: MAGE：理解多组件提示优化中的稳定性与性能权衡
title_en: MAGE: Understanding Stability-Performance Trade-offs in Multi-component Prompt Optimization
summary_zh: 本文介绍了MAGE（一种记忆增强的目标导向提示进化框架），用于分析提示优化中各组件的相互作用。研究发现了提示优化耦合效应（POCE）：多个随机优化信号在闭环中交互，既提升性能又放大方差。这一效果无法通过单独分析各组件预测。实验显示，基于失败反思的方法效果显著优于仅依赖分数或抽象评审的方法；MAGE在多个测试集上的表现优于GEPA；增加候选多样性显著提升准确率，同时放大方差；且该效应依赖基础模型的表现和训练数据规模。结果表明提示优化系统行为复杂，评估时应兼顾性能和稳定性。
summary_en: This paper introduces MAGE, a Memory-Augmented Goal-directed Prompt Evolution framework, to study interactions among components in prompt optimization. It uncovers the Prompt Optimization Coupling Effect (POCE), where multiple stochastic optimization signals in a closed loop jointly improve performance but increase variance, an effect unpredictable by isolated component analysis. Experiments show failure-grounded reflection is crucial, outperforming score-only or abstract critique methods; MAGE surpasses GEPA on benchmark tests; increasing candidate diversity boosts accuracy at the cost of variance; and POCE depends on base model accuracy and training data size. These findings highlight the complex, coupled stochastic nature of prompt optimization systems, advocating for evaluation focusing on both performance and stability.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作首次系统揭示了多组件提示优化中性能提升与方差增大的耦合效应，挑战了传统单一维度评估方式，推动了对提示优化复杂行为更全面的理解，对于未来设计更稳定高效的提示优化算法具有重要指导意义。
why_it_matters_en: This work systematically reveals the coupling effect between performance gains and variance amplification in multi-component prompt optimization, challenging traditional single-metric evaluations. It advances a deeper understanding of the complex behaviors in prompt optimization, providing crucial guidance for designing more stable and efficient prompt optimization algorithms in the future.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: MAGE: Understanding Stability-Performance Trade-offs in Multi-component Prompt Optimization. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
